text: Submit a compelling "Prototype Fund" application in October
description: Use October to turn the Prototype Fund opportunity into a submitted-quality application early in the 1 October-30 November window. Target an internal complete draft by 15 October and submission by 31 October, leaving November for corrections if the platform permits. Frame the funded project as a concrete new open-source software-infrastructure module, not as general operating support for an already-built application.

status.comment: Primary October objective. Prototype Fund application work is organized in the child phase.
